  • Home
  • Marketplace
  • ECUs

BSG_V2.1

OBD Information

Protocol: CAN
Send ID: 18DA14F2
Recv ID: 18DAF214
Baudrate: 10400
Func Addr: 14
Func Name: SSG

Auto IDents

[
  {
    "diagversion": "4",
    "supplier": "VALEO",
    "soft": "SW20",
    "version": "20181019"
  }
]

Devices

[
  {
    "dtc": 7313,
    "dtctype": 3,
    "devicedata": {},
    "name": "BSG Battery Voltage Failures"
  },
  {
    "dtc": 7318,
    "dtctype": 2,
    "devicedata": {},
    "name": "BSG Components"
  },
  {
    "dtc": 7312,
    "dtctype": 2,
    "devicedata": {},
    "name": "BSG Internal Failures"
  },
  {
    "dtc": 49274,
    "dtctype": 4,
    "devicedata": {},
    "name": "CAN CONTROLLER Bus Off Status"
  },
  {
    "dtc": 57679,
    "dtctype": 4,
    "devicedata": {},
    "name": "Communication Failure of BCM ECU"
  },
  {
    "dtc": 57664,
    "dtctype": 4,
    "devicedata": {},
    "name": "Communication Failure of ECM ECU"
  },
  {
    "dtc": 57691,
    "dtctype": 4,
    "devicedata": {},
    "name": "Communication Failure of USM ECU"
  },
  {
    "dtc": 57672,
    "dtctype": 4,
    "devicedata": {},
    "name": "Communication Failure of VDC ECU"
  },
  {
    "dtc": 7314,
    "dtctype": 4,
    "devicedata": {},
    "name": "Message counter failure with ECM"
  },
  {
    "dtc": 7315,
    "dtctype": 4,
    "devicedata": {},
    "name": "Message counter failure with USM"
  },
  {
    "dtc": 7317,
    "dtctype": 3,
    "devicedata": {},
    "name": "Ignition line failure"
  }
]
